title: Fix UVM static cast from a stream type
body:
Fix UVM static cast from a stream type.  This is one of a few remaining blockers to UVM #1538.

This can be seen by editing test_regress/t/t_uvm_all.pl to remove --debug-exit-uvm, and commenting out the line to workaround #4466.

```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:21284:17: Unsupported: static cast to 'ENUMDTYPE 'uvm_pkg::uvm_tlm_command_e'' from 'STREAMDTYPE'
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:21311:25: Unsupported: static cast to 'ENUMDTYPE 'uvm_pkg::uvm_tlm_response_status_e'' from 'STREAMDTYPE'
21311 |     m_response_status = uvm_tlm_response_status_e'({ << bit { __array }});
      |                         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
code_blocks:
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:21284:17: Unsupported: static cast to 'ENUMDTYPE 'uvm_pkg::uvm_tlm_command_e'' from 'STREAMDTYPE'
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:21311:25: Unsupported: static cast to 'ENUMDTYPE 'uvm_pkg::uvm_tlm_response_status_e'' from 'STREAMDTYPE'
21311 |     m_response_status = uvm_tlm_response_status_e'({ << bit { __array }});
      |                         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
